comments:
Audio accessibility atoms for inclusive design.

## Design Philosophy

Accessibility is not an afterthought — it's a first-class concern. These
atoms enable agents to build interfaces that are usable by people with
visual, auditory, and cognitive differences.

## Screen Reader Support
Structured content for screen readers: announcements, regions, live updates.

## Audio Descriptions
Descriptive audio for visual content: images, charts, motion graphics.

## Sonification
Data-to-sound mapping for eyes-free interfaces: earcons, auditory icons,
parameter mapping.

## Auditory UI
Non-visual interface elements: audio menus, spatial audio navigation.

## Usage
```purescript
import Hydrogen.Schema.Audio.Accessibility as A11y

-- Create an announcement
announcement = A11y.announcement
  A11y.PriorityHigh
  A11y.PolitenessAssertive
  "File upload complete"
```

declarations.comments: AnnouncementPriority - urgency level for screen reader announcements.
declarations.title: AnnouncementPriority

declarations.comments: Politeness - ARIA live region politeness setting.
declarations.title: Politeness

declarations.comments: Announcement - content for screen reader announcement.
declarations.title: Announcement

declarations.comments: Create a quiet (polite, low priority) announcement.
declarations.title: announcementQuiet

declarations.comments: DescriptionContext - what type of content is being described.
declarations.title: DescriptionContext

declarations.comments: AudioDescription - descriptive audio for visual content.
declarations.title: AudioDescription

declarations.comments: Create an extended description with alternative.
declarations.title: descriptionExtended

declarations.comments: EarconCategory - semantic category for non-verbal audio cues.
declarations.title: EarconCategory

declarations.comments: Get display name for earcon category
declarations.title: earconCategoryName

declarations.comments:
AuditoryIcon - real-world sound representing an action.
Unlike earcons (abstract), auditory icons are representational.
declarations.title: AuditoryIcon

declarations.comments: SonificationDimension - what audio parameter to map data to.
declarations.title: SonificationDimension

declarations.comments: SonificationScale - how to scale data values to audio.
declarations.title: SonificationScale

declarations.comments: SonificationMapping - how to map a data dimension to sound.
declarations.title: SonificationMapping

declarations.comments: Get display name for audio cue
declarations.title: audioCueName

declarations.comments: NavigationSound - audio feedback for spatial navigation.
declarations.title: NavigationSound

declarations.comments:
ReadingSpeed - TTS/screen reader speech rate multiplier.
1.0 = normal, 0.5 = half speed, 2.0 = double speed.
declarations.title: ReadingSpeed

declarations.comments:
Bounds for ReadingSpeed

Min: 0.25 (quarter speed)
Max: 4.0 (quadruple speed)
declarations.title: readingSpeedBounds

name: Hydrogen.Schema.Audio.Accessibility
